creationDate.description: The creation date or creation date range of the activity

oneOf.description: The creation date of the activity.

The creation dates range.

Ranges are expressed as follow:
  - Comma to separate start value from end value
  - Start value or end value can be omitted (it means values are infinite)
  - Start with `[` means *start value is included*
  - Start with `]` means *start value is excluded*
  - End with `[` means *end value is included*
  - End with `]` means *end value is excluded*

endDate.description: The end date pf the activity (copy of the date associated to the SUCCEEDED or FAILED stage)

oneOf.description: The end date of the activity.

The end dates range.

Ranges are expressed as follow:
  - Comma to separate start value from end value
  - Start value or end value can be omitted (it means values are infinite)
  - Start with `[` means *start value is included*
  - Start with `]` means *start value is excluded*
  - End with `[` means *end value is included*
  - End with `]` means *end value is excluded*

itemsPerPage.description: Number of requested items per page

payload.description: The copy of the origin user request. It could be the whole object or only some elements.

oneOf.description: String representation of the json object.

sortBy.description: Unbounded list or parameters to sort by. The '+' indicates ascendant ordering, the '-' indicates descendant ordering. If not precised, default to '+'

startDate.description: The start date of the activity (date of the first stage that is not QUEUED)

oneOf.description: The start date of the activity.

The start dates range.

Ranges are expressed as follow:
  - Comma to separate start value from end value
  - Start value or end value can be omitted (it means values are infinite)
  - Start with `[` means *start value is included*
  - Start with `]` means *start value is excluded*
  - End with `[` means *end value is included*
  - End with `]` means *end value is excluded*

startIndex.description: The index of the first item present in the response

status.description: The status or status list (comma separated list) of the activity.
